title: dactylorhiza incarnata var. extensa
intro: Dactylorhiza incarnata var. extensa, also known as the Extended Spotted Orchid, is a variety of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza incarnata var. extensa are thought to include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
